candidate_blind: Every choice -- each pooling rung (including the completed asymmetric age-2 marital rung) and each earnings prune -- is determined ONLY by truth-side power arithmetic (floor sigmas, weaker-half event counts, and v1 tolerance/sigma ratios). Nothing here references a projection engine, a candidate, or what any model would find easy or hard. The one vocabulary freedom the referee flagged (the un-enumerated rung) SHRANK the gated surface by forcing a further earnings prune -- the opposite direction from candidate-favoring.
supersedes_note: v3 supersedes v2 by COMPLETING the marital coarsening ladder's rung enumeration (referee amendment 2 + the orchestrator's v3 adjudication): v2's marital ladder enumerated a symmetric age-2 rung but not the asymmetric age-2 rung ([18-64],[65+]) that the mortality ladder's own merge vocabulary already used -- the single rung where remarriage clears. v1 (the frozen PAUSE evidence) and v2 (the frozen prior surface) are BOTH neither mutated nor rewritten; v1 is read only for the pinned earnings pruning order and the earnings floor (identical in v1/v2), and v2 is cited as immediate lineage, read for no choice.

v2_lineage.note: v2 cleared the weak-power threshold with an INCOMPLETE marital ladder enumeration (symmetric age-2 only). v3 completes the enumeration; v2 is frozen as lineage evidence and is not read for any v3 choice.

coarsening_ladder.rule: per transition type, pool ADJACENT strata minimally in the pinned order sex-pool -> age-pool-adjacent; adopt the MINIMAL rung with >= 1 cell clearing tolerance <= ln(1.5) AND >= 20 weaker-half events; mortality 85+ stays report-only (attrition_confounded_truth) at every rung.

marital_ladder_completion.change: v3 adds the asymmetric age-2 marital rung sex_pooled_age2p ([18-64],[65+]) after the symmetric age-2 rung -- the elderly-isolating merge shape the mortality ladder already used, uniformly per marital transition type as originally pinned.

sweep_dispositions.divorce: adopts sex_pooled_age2 (unchanged); the new asymmetric rung is later in the ladder and never reached
sweep_dispositions.remarriage: adopts sex_pooled_age2p (NEW); clears ONLY at the asymmetric age-2 rung -- nothing clears at any rung v2 enumerated
sweep_dispositions.widowhood: clears NOTHING at any rung, including the new asymmetric rung -- best tolerance ~0.474 (fully pooled), robustly above the ln(1.5) cap

earnings_decompounding_ladder.rule: prune gated earnings cells weakest-power-first (largest v1 tolerance/sigma first), recomputing combined p_gate after each prune, stopping at the FIRST p_gate >= 0.90, never below >= 1 gated cell per concept family -- the LARGEST surface meeting the power floor under the ladder (maximum falsifiability subject to power).

presence_conditioning.rule: Every truth cell is computed on the realized-wave-presence set (PSID sequence 1-20, positive weight), SYMMETRICALLY on both halves and (for the candidate, not built here) both sides (sec. 4.4). demographic_panel / read_disability_status / family_earnings_panel are present-only by construction; marital events + at-risk person-years are conditioned on presence at the biennial interview OPENING the interval that contains the event year.

per_family.mortality: present at the interval-start interview (slices credited only from an observed wave); conditioning-not-leakage (PSID retention is unmodelled).
per_family.marital: present at the opening biennial interview of the event's interval; conditioning-not-leakage.
per_family.disability: reproduction mode -- realized support preserved (read_disability_status present-only); a PASS certifies a TEMPORAL gate_m4 extension, NOT M6 forward disability (sec. 4.4, finding 7).
per_family.earnings: present with a valid positive-weight earnings observation at the reference-year wave.

f6_weight_rule.definition: Every gated rate, every truth cell, and the floor use the person's realized start-of-holdout START-WAVE cross-sectional PSID weight, held FIXED across the window (F6, sec. 4.7). The per-year calibrated panel weight is NOT used (it would put a different weight on the two sides and bias every ratio); it is a report-only alternative.
f6_weight_rule.start_wave: the earliest gated interview wave (2015 / 2017 / 2019, >= the 2015 T* seed) at which the person is present.

household_id_weight_carriage_rule.household_id: the PSID family interview number (ER30001-scoped, panels.demographic_panel `interview`) at the person's realized start-of-holdout wave, held FIXED across the window -- consistent with the F6 start-wave anchoring.
household_id_weight_carriage_rule.divorce_splitoff_rule: a within-window divorce / splitoff does NOT reassign household_id; both ex-partners keep their fixed start-wave household (conservative: keeps a correlated ex-couple on ONE side of the split, so the split cannot understate correlation).
household_id_weight_carriage_rule.entrant_child_rule: synthetic births + immigrant cohorts are the family-B closed-panel entrants (sec. 4.8) and are OUT of the family-A floor; children present at the start wave carry that wave's household.
household_id_weight_carriage_rule.fallback: a person with no gated-wave interview number falls back to a singleton household (their own person_id).
household_id_weight_carriage_rule.split_bias_diagnostic: runs comparison: person-disjoint vs household-disjoint floor widths on the household-split family-A cells (see split_width_diagnostic); a rule that biased the split would move the ratio far from 1.

split_units.note: correlation-respecting half split (sec. 4.7): the demographic flows with within-household correlation split HOUSEHOLD-disjoint (couple-disjoint subsumed); disability + earnings split PERSON-disjoint (sec. 4.5).

design_pins.seed_wave_note: PSID interviews are biennial ODD years; T*=2014 realizes its seed state at the 2015 interview (reference year 2014).
design_pins.k20_estimator_note: the candidate side (not built here) is the K=20-draw mean on numpy.random.default_rng(5200 + k), scored once |ln(rbar/rate_a)| against side-A truth (sec. 4.7).

data.psid_wave_calendar: biennial odd-year interviews 1999-2023; even-year income reference years

floor.method: 100-seed real-vs-real half split (populace_dynamics.harness.panel.split_panel_by_person, fraction 0.5, seeds 0-99) of the presence-conditioned, F6-weighted holdout truth; floor statistic |ln(rate_a/rate_b)| for rate / log_ratio cells, |value_a - value_b| for the typed abs_gap cells. (mean, sd, realized_sigma) per cell derive round(mean + k*sd, 3) capped at the metric's power cap.

combined.method: Independence-approx normal OC on the DRAW-NOISE-FREE half-normal basis: a faithful candidate's per-cell score ~ half-normal(realized_sigma); cell pass = 2*Phi(tolerance/sigma)-1; seed pass = product over the gated family-A cells; gate = P(>=4 of 5) = p^5 + 5 p^4 (1-p). The K=20-draw mean estimator shares this basis (sec. 4.7).

family_a_flows.method: Independence-approx normal OC on the DRAW-NOISE-FREE half-normal basis: a faithful candidate's per-cell score ~ half-normal(realized_sigma); cell pass = 2*Phi(tolerance/sigma)-1; seed pass = product over the gated family-A cells; gate = P(>=4 of 5) = p^5 + 5 p^4 (1-p). The K=20-draw mean estimator shares this basis (sec. 4.7).

earnings_subfamily.method: Independence-approx normal OC on the DRAW-NOISE-FREE half-normal basis: a faithful candidate's per-cell score ~ half-normal(realized_sigma); cell pass = 2*Phi(tolerance/sigma)-1; seed pass = product over the gated family-A cells; gate = P(>=4 of 5) = p^5 + 5 p^4 (1-p). The K=20-draw mean estimator shares this basis (sec. 4.7).

oc_before_lock.outcome: surface clears; ceremony may proceed to lock

split_width_diagnostic.note: person- vs household-disjoint realized_sigma on the adopted coarsened household-split (marital + mortality) flow cells; ~1 confirms the T*-anchored household-ID rule does not bias the redesigned family-A floor (the sec. 9 finding-13 watch-item).
